# Does the SNHP advisor help? — Amendment 3 results

*Generated by `python -m arena.gauntlet.advice_analysis`. Paired solo-vs-advised arms on the frozen pool, matched inference config (thinking disabled in BOTH arms). Reported, never certified.*

**Registered prediction (stated before the run):** Registered before running (PREREG-pool.md Amendment 3): MEAN — advice helps the weaker model materially and the stronger barely; we predict Haiku advised-solo > 0 at p<0.01 on both sets and Sonnet's mean effect small and possibly not separable (headroom to the engine: Haiku +0.048/+0.049, Sonnet +0.012/+0.037). DOWNSIDE — we predict advice improves BOTH downside statistics for BOTH models on both sets: breach rate P(u<=BATNA) falls and CVaR@10 rises. Stated bidirectionally: advice may HURT the mean (the carried-counterparty effect that puts the champion below naive); a negative mean with an improved downside reads 'SNHP buys safety, not surplus'. If the downside does NOT improve, that is a KILL of the floor claim on this instrument, reported as such with no re-cut.

## MEAN — does advice raise own-utility?

| model | set | n pairs | solo | advised | delta | perm p | reading |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| claude-sonnet-5 | PUBLIC | 360 | 0.5874 | 0.6248 | +0.0374 | 0.0001 | advice helps |
| claude-sonnet-5 | HELD-OUT-NEW | 360 | 0.5939 | 0.6392 | +0.0453 | 0.0001 | advice helps |
| claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 | PUBLIC | 360 | 0.5218 | 0.5796 | +0.0578 | 0.0001 | advice helps |
| claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 | HELD-OUT-NEW | 360 | 0.5164 | 0.5888 | +0.0724 | 0.0001 | advice helps |

## DOWNSIDE-1 — breach rate P(own-utility <= BATNA). Lower is better.

| model | set | solo | advised | delta | perm p | reading |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| claude-sonnet-5 | PUBLIC | 0.286 | 0.208 | -0.078 | 0.0001 | **floor holds** — breaches fall |
| claude-sonnet-5 | HELD-OUT-NEW | 0.256 | 0.175 | -0.081 | 0.0001 | **floor holds** — breaches fall |
| claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 | PUBLIC | 0.431 | 0.189 | -0.242 | 0.0001 | **floor holds** — breaches fall |
| claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 | HELD-OUT-NEW | 0.453 | 0.164 | -0.289 | 0.0001 | **floor holds** — breaches fall |

## DOWNSIDE-2 — CVaR@10 (mean of each arm's worst 10%). Higher is better; CI is a paired bootstrap (10,000 resamples), 99%.

| model | set | solo | advised | delta | CI | reading |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| claude-sonnet-5 | PUBLIC | 0.2992 | 0.2917 | -0.0075 | [-0.0333, +0.0024] | CI spans 0 — no effect |
| claude-sonnet-5 | HELD-OUT-NEW | 0.3000 | 0.3000 | +0.0000 | [+0.0000, +0.0000] | CI spans 0 — no effect |
| claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 | PUBLIC | 0.2906 | 0.2888 | -0.0017 | [-0.0327, +0.0200] | CI spans 0 — no effect |
| claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 | HELD-OUT-NEW | 0.2559 | 0.2895 | +0.0336 | [-0.0125, +0.0839] | CI spans 0 — no effect |

## Verdict (mechanical)

**Downside verdict: the floor claim SURVIVES** (evaluated: claude-sonnet-5, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) — advice measurably improves a registered downside statistic.

- **claude-sonnet-5** — MEAN: helps (delta>0, p<0.01) on both sets. DOWNSIDE: breach rate falls; CVaR@10 not improved.
- **claude-haiku-4-5-20251001** — MEAN: helps (delta>0, p<0.01) on both sets. DOWNSIDE: breach rate falls; CVaR@10 not improved.

Context only, no role in any verdict — fraction of advised turns on which the model adopted the recommendation:

- claude-sonnet-5 / PUBLIC: 0.12
- claude-sonnet-5 / HELD-OUT-NEW: 0.14
- claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 / PUBLIC: 0.59
- claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 / HELD-OUT-NEW: 0.55

Regenerate: `python -m arena.gauntlet.llm_tier --amendment 3` (paid; checkpointed + resumable) then `python -m arena.gauntlet.advice_analysis` (read-only, no LLM).
